displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: A perfect blend of classic Vitasoy and banana juice to create a light yet flavourful indulgence for your taste buds. Discover a remarkably smooth tasting experience with a balance of subtle sweetness and the rich flavour of soyabean. Low sugar, no cholesterol, light and tasty, delightful and guilt-free.

product.name: Yeo's Packet Drink - Black Soy Milk

offers.description: Buy 1 Yeo's Packet Drink - Black Soy Milk @ $1.60

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Sugar, Soya Bean, Soya Bean Oil, Calcium Phosphate, Salt, Flavouring
metaData.Key Information:
• 25% higher in calcium and 25% lower in sugar compared to regular soya beverages
• Natural, low fat, cholesterol free, dairy free, lower in sugar and higher in calcium
• Ultra-high temperature technology, no preservative required
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
• Vitasoy Cornflake:
1. Pour 15g of cornflake into a large bowl
2. Pour 250ml of Vitasoy into the bowl and soak the cornflake for 1 minute or longer
• Vitasoy Oatmeal:
1. Pour 10 teaspoons of oatmeal into a bowl
2. Pour 250ml of Vitasoy into the oatmeal and put the bowl in microwave for 3 minutes on medium high (750W)
• Vitasoy and Cookies:
1. Pour 250ml of Vitasoy into a glass
2.Put the cookies into Vitasoy to soak 10 - 20 seconds and serve immediately
• Warm Vitasoy:
1. Shake Vitasoy well
2. Pour Vitasoy into a glass
3. Put the glass of Vitasoy in microwave for 1½ minutes on medium high (750W)
metaData.Storage Information: Refrigerate at 4°C after opening and consume within 4 days
